---
title: "overwatch.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\overwatch.py"
loc: 118
complexity: 19
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.69
intel_score: 3.43
overall_score: 1.21
---

## Intent
The `overwatch.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on get_timestamp, get_stats, check_for_changes. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via get_timestamp, get_stats, check_for_changes. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [msvcrt](file://msvcrt)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)

### Exports
- `get_timestamp`
- `get_stats`
- `check_for_changes`
